summary: Iteration 22 - React Website v2 Frontend Testing at /api/site/. All major v2 features verified: Logo 'Le SIJILL.' with green dot, French accents corrected, navigation (Cursus/Catalogue/À propos), Catalogue page with 24 courses alphabetically sorted with cursus badges, À propos page with full content (Pourquoi/Qui sommes-nous/4 principles/Shlomo Pines quote), Cursus accordion, Course detail hierarchy (Cursus→Cours→Modules→Épisodes), Audio player bar with controls, Login/Logout flow.

issues: Minor: 'réservés' shows as 'RÉSERVÉS' in uppercase but text-transform:uppercase CSS may affect accent rendering - visually correct

context_for_next_testing_agent: React website v2 at /api/site/ fully tested. All pages working correctly. Logo shows 'Le SIJILL.' with green dot (Le in italic Lora font, SIJILL in Cinzel small-caps, dot in green accent). All French accents working (structurés, théologie, littérature, spiritualité, épisodes, spécialistes). Navigation updated to Cursus | Catalogue | À propos. Login shows user name 'LOUBNA BIS' with avatar and 'QUITTER' button. Course detail shows proper hierarchy with modules accordion (M01, M02...) expanding to show episodes. Audio player bar has play/pause, -15/+15 seek, progress bar. Lock icons shown for unauthenticated users, play icons for authenticated.

homepage_logo.details: Logo shows 'Le SIJILL.' with structure: Le Sijill. - dot styled green

homepage_accents.details: All French accents correct: structurés, théologie, littérature, spiritualité, épisodes, spécialistes. 'Plateforme académique' in uppercase renders correctly

navigation_links.details: Navigation shows: Cursus | Catalogue | À propos (with accent). All links functional via SPA routing

catalogue_page.details: Shows 24 courses sorted alphabetically (Adab et sciences médicales first). Each card has colored dot, title, description, module count, and cursus badge

about_page.details: Full content present: Le Sijill title with green dot, 'Pourquoi Le Sijill?', 'Qui sommes-nous?', 4 numbered principles (h3 headings), Shlomo Pines blockquote, bullet lists of disciplines

cursus_page.details: 5 cursus items with accordion. Each shows letter (A-E), name, description, course count. Clicking expands to show course cards with module counts

course_detail_hierarchy.details: Proper hierarchy: Cursus badge 'A CURSUS A' → Course title 'Falsafa — Les grands philosophes' → 10 Modules accordion (M01, M02...) → Episodes inside modules

course_detail_episodes_unauthenticated.details: Lock icon (🔒) shown for episodes when user not logged in. Login CTA displayed

course_detail_episodes_authenticated.details: Play icon (▶) shown instead of lock after login. Login CTA hidden. Episodes clickable to play

login_flow.details: Login form with email/password inputs, 'SE CONNECTER' button. After login redirects to home. Header shows user name 'LOUBNA BIS' with avatar 'L' and 'QUITTER' logout button

audio_player_bar.details: After clicking episode, player bar appears at bottom with: track title, time display (0:00 / 0:00), -15 rewind button, play/pause button (green), +15 forward button, progress bar

footer_accents.details: Footer shows: 'Parcours académiques en sciences islamiques. Philosophie, théologie, droit, littérature et spiritualité.' and '© 2026. TOUS DROITS RÉSERVÉS.'

spa_routing.details: All navigation works via react-router without full page reload. Logo returns to home, nav links work, back button on course detail works
